About: It is about a boardsport using a skimboard to glide across wet sand and the water's surface.
ConsistsOf: It consists of using a skimboard to glide across wet sand and the water's surface.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Tex Haines and Peter Prietto.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in Laguna Beach, California.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by gliding across wet sand.
It is characterized by gliding across the water's surface.
It is characterized by meeting an incoming breaking wave.
It is characterized by riding waves back to shore.
It is characterized by beginning on the beach by dropping the board onto the thin wash of previous waves.
It is characterized by using momentum to skim out to breaking waves.
It is characterized by performing tricks derived from skateboarding on the wash of waves.
It is characterized by using the city instead of the beach to skimboard.
It is characterized by taking advantage of fountains, canals, and water mirrors in the city.
HeldIn: It was held in Laguna Beach, California.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Polynesian pioneers.
IsA: It is a newer style of skimboarding coined "urban skimboarding".
KnownFor: It is known for trick performance.
It is known for its steep shorelines and frequent shorebreak in Laguna Beach, California.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Laguna Beach, California.
It occurred in several European nations.
OriginatedIn: It originated in Laguna Beach, California.
UsedAs: It is used as a skateboard for performing tricks.
UsedFor: It is used for gliding across wet sand.
It is used for gliding across the water's surface.
It is used for meeting an incoming breaking wave.
It is used for riding waves back to shore.
It is used for performing tricks derived from skateboarding.
It is used for skimming on the wash of waves without focusing on catching and riding waves.
It is used for skimming in the city.
It is used for taking advantage of fountains, canals, and water mirrors in the city.
UsedIn: It is used in water mirrors.
It is used in shallow bodies of water in the city.
UsedTo: It is used to glide across wet sand.
It is used to glide across the water's surface.
It is used to meet an incoming breaking wave.
It is used to ride waves back to shore.
It is used to skim out to breaking waves.
It is used to perform tricks derived from skateboarding.
It is used to skimboard in the city.
